history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! How can I help you today? What type of food would you like?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hello, I'm looking for a hearty meal today. I can't have sugar, so please recommend what you have that would work for me.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! We have Chicken McNuggets as a hearty meal option, but they contain gluten and we don't have sugar information for them. Since you can't have sugar, we don't have any sugar-free items on the menu. Would you like to proceed with Chicken McNuggets?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I can't have sugar, but I'll take the Chicken McNuggets. Please confirm if they contain sugar.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Chicken McNuggets don't have sugar listed on our menu, so I can't confirm their sugar content. Your order is Chicken McNuggets. Would you like to add a drink or fries?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take water and fries. Please confirm they don't contain sugar.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have water or fries on our current menu. Would you like to choose from what we do have instead?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll take Chicken McNuggets. Do you have any sides without sugar?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have any sides that are sugar-free on the menu. Your order is 1 Chicken McNuggets. Would you like to confirm this order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take the Chicken McNuggets. I can't have sugar, so please confirm they don't contain it.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Chicken McNuggets don't have sugar listed on our menu, so I can't confirm they're sugar-free. Your order is 1 Chicken McNuggets. Is this your final order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you for your help. I'll confirm Chicken McNuggets as my order. I appreciate you checking the sugar content.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: 1 Chicken McNuggets. This item contains gluten and we don't have sugar information for it. Have a great day!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you for confirming. I appreciate you checking the sugar content. Have a great day!
